fields.Name: GrowthZone
fields.Description: GrowthZone association management platform integration for syncing contacts, organizations, memberships, certifications, groups, events, billing, and store data via the GrowthZone REST API. Uses the /api/contacts/delta endpoint for incremental contact ...

fields.Name: contacts
fields.Description: Base contact list with minimal fields from the GrowthZone delta endpoint (/api/contacts/delta). Use for incremental sync — only returns ContactId, DisplayName, ModifiedDate, IsDeleted, and SystemContactTypeId. Follow up with contact-person or contact-org to fetch full detail.

fields.Name: DisplayName
fields.Description: Formatted display name for the contact (person or organization)

fields.Name: ModifiedDate
fields.Description: Timestamp of the last modification — used as watermark for delta sync

fields.Name: IsDeleted
fields.Description: Soft-delete flag. True indicates the contact was deleted in GrowthZone since the last sync.

fields.Name: SystemContactTypeId
fields.Description: Distinguishes contact type. 1 = Individual, 2 = Organization. Determines whether to fetch detail from /api/contacts/person/{id} or /api/contacts/OrgGeneral/{id}.

fields.Name: contact-person
fields.Description: Full person-contact detail fetched per contact from /api/contacts/person/{ContactId}. Includes name, title, demographic, employer, and primary address fields. Requires parent contact IDs from the contacts object.

fields.Name: PrefixTitle
fields.Description: Personal prefix title (Mr, Mrs, Dr, etc.)

fields.Name: SuffixTitle
fields.Description: Personal suffix title (Jr, Sr, III, etc.)

fields.Name: EmployerContactId
fields.Description: ContactId of the associated employer organization

fields.Name: BirthDate
fields.Description: Date of birth. GrowthZone may return 0001-01-01 for null values — normalize these to null.

fields.Name: IsDeceased
fields.Description: Whether the person is marked deceased

fields.Name: CreatedDate
fields.Description: Timestamp when the contact was created

fields.Name: contact-org
fields.Description: Full organization-contact detail fetched per contact from /api/contacts/OrgGeneral/{ContactId}. The response contains nested arrays (Activities, Categories, Certifications, Communication, Memberships, SalesOpportunities) which are flattened into separate integration objects by the connector.

fields.Name: Naics
fields.Description: North American Industry Classification System code

fields.Name: Bio
fields.Description: Long-form biography or description of the organization

fields.Name: ParentContactId
fields.Description: ContactId of the parent organization (for hierarchical relationships)

fields.Name: CreatedDate
fields.Description: Timestamp when the organization was created

fields.Name: contact-notes-fields
fields.Description: Extended fields and custom field values for a contact, fetched per-contact from /api/contacts/{ContactId}/NotesAndFields. Returns Notes, Bio, EstablishedDate, Naics, Sic, plus a Fields[] array of custom field values.

fields.Name: ContactId
fields.Description: ContactId for which these notes and fields apply

fields.Name: contact-custom-field-values
fields.Description: Flattened per-contact custom field values, derived from the Fields[] array on /api/contacts/{ContactId}/NotesAndFields. One row per (ContactId, CustomFieldId) pair.

fields.Name: ContactId
fields.Description: Contact to which this field value belongs (part of composite key)

fields.Name: CustomFieldId
fields.Description: Custom field definition identifier (part of composite key)

fields.Name: Name
fields.Description: Internal name of the custom field

fields.Name: DisplayName
fields.Description: User-facing label of the custom field

fields.Name: CustomFieldType
fields.Description: Type of custom field (Text, Number, Date, SelectList, Scale, ExternalDataSource, File, Table)

fields.Name: Value
fields.Description: Current custom field value for this contact, stringified

fields.Name: FieldGroupName
fields.Description: Grouping category for the custom field

fields.Name: IsPublic
fields.Description: Whether the custom field is publicly visible

fields.Name: IsArchived
fields.Description: Whether the custom field is archived

fields.Name: memberships
fields.Description: Flat list of memberships across all contacts from /api/memberships/all. Supports OData-style pagination ($skip, $top, $orderby). Framework research (2026-05) suggests incremental sync may be possible via ChangeEventTypeId; not flipped here without live verification.

fields.Name: JoinDate
fields.Description: Original join date for this contact's membership

fields.Name: groups
fields.Description: Flat list of groups/committees from /api/groups. Groups represent collaborative or organizational groupings of contacts (boards, committees, chapters, forums).

fields.Name: certifications
fields.Description: Certification records assigned to contacts. The GrowthZone curated API supports marking certification components complete via POST /api/certifications/{id}/Components/{componentId}/Completed.

fields.Name: CertificationContactId
fields.Description: Unique certification record identifier (composite of certification + contact)

fields.Name: CompletionDate
fields.Description: Date when the certification was completed

fields.Name: certification-components
fields.Description: Individual components/requirements of certifications. Can be marked complete via POST /api/certifications/{certificationContactId}/Components/{certificationComponentId}/Completed — this is the only confirmed write endpoint in the curated GrowthZone API.

fields.Name: IsCompleted
fields.Description: Whether this component is marked complete

fields.Name: CompletedDate
fields.Description: Timestamp when the component was marked complete

fields.Name: contact-activities
fields.Description: Flattened activities from the Activities[] nested array inside /api/contacts/OrgGeneral/{ContactId}. Represents logged interactions (calls, emails, meetings) with a contact.

fields.Name: ContactId
fields.Description: Contact the activity is logged against

fields.Name: ActivityType
fields.Description: Type of activity (Call, Email, Meeting, Note)

fields.Name: contact-communications
fields.Description: Flattened communications from the Communication[] nested array inside /api/contacts/OrgGeneral/{ContactId}. Email, SMS, and other outbound communications.

fields.Name: ContactId
fields.Description: Contact the communication was sent to

fields.Name: contact-categories
fields.Description: Flattened categories from the Categories[] nested array in /api/contacts/OrgGeneral/{ContactId}. Category memberships (industry groups, interest areas, etc.) assigned to a contact.

fields.Name: ContactId
fields.Description: Contact assigned to the category (part of composite key)

fields.Name: CategoryItemId
fields.Description: Category assignment identifier (part of composite key)

fields.Name: contact-sales-opportunities
fields.Description: Flattened sales opportunities from the SalesOpportunities[] nested array in /api/contacts/OrgGeneral/{ContactId}.

fields.Name: events
fields.Description: Events hosted in GrowthZone, typically accessed via /api/events. Event registrations are tracked as separate records.

fields.Name: event-registrations
fields.Description: Registrations for events by contacts, accessed via /api/events/registrations.

fields.Name: PaymentMethod
fields.Description: Payment instrument (Credit Card, ACH, Check, Cash)

fields.Name: store-items
fields.Description: Products/items available in the GrowthZone store, accessed via /api/store/storeitems.

fields.Name: IsActive
fields.Description: Whether the item is available for purchase

fields.Name: orders
fields.Description: Customer orders from the store, accessed via /api/orders.

fields.Name: billings
fields.Description: Billing records (scheduled, recurring, and manual), accessed via /api/billings.

fields.Name: IsActive
fields.Description: Whether the billing schedule is active

fields.Name: custom-field-definitions
fields.Description: Custom field definitions for contacts, discovered at runtime by calling /api/contacts/{ContactId}/NotesAndFields on a sample contact. New discoveries are marked IsCustom=true in MJ metadata.

fields.Name: Name
fields.Description: Internal name of the custom field

fields.Name: DisplayName
fields.Description: User-facing label of the custom field

fields.Name: CustomFieldType
fields.Description: Field type (Text, Number, Date, SelectList, Scale, ExternalDataSource, File, Table)

fields.Name: IsPublic
fields.Description: Whether the custom field is publicly visible

fields.Name: IsMemberEditable
fields.Description: Whether members can edit this field

fields.Name: IsArchived
fields.Description: Whether the field definition is archived

fields.Name: FieldGroupName
fields.Description: Grouping category for the custom field

fields.Name: SelectOptions
fields.Description: Valid values (JSON array) for SelectList custom fields

fields.Name: account-info
fields.Description: GrowthZone tenant account record (single object). Useful for surfacing tenant identity in MJ dashboards. Endpoint per framework research at /api/account/items.

fields.Name: account-modules
fields.Description: List of GrowthZone modules enabled for the tenant. Useful for capability detection per tenant.

fields.Name: benefit-packages
fields.Description: Membership benefit packages defined by the tenant. Useful for cross-referencing memberships → benefits.

fields.Name: cms-sites
fields.Description: GrowthZone CMS sites configured for the tenant.

fields.Name: customfields-all
fields.Description: Tenant-wide custom field definitions across all object types. Used by the connector at DiscoverAndPersistAuthenticatedSchema time to enumerate tenant-specific custom fields and add them as IOF rows with Source=Discovered.
